title: carex distans subsp. aspratilis
intro: Carex distans subsp. aspratilis, also known as the slender sedge or Carex aspratilis, is a type of sedge plant that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Carex distans subsp. aspratilis include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to alleviate various health issues.
